name: Sala de Juegos 3D
short_description: 3D Game Room is the perfect space to enjoy classic board games with family or friends
detailed_description:
Welcome to Sala de Juegos 3D!

A unique collection of classic board games in an immersive 3D environment with online multiplayer. Gather your family or friends and enjoy timeless games like never before.

🎮 What's Included?

  • 🟡 Ludo (Parchís): With dynamic lighting, realistic dice, and smooth movement.

  • 🐍 Snakes and Ladders: A colorful board where luck rules the game.

  • 🏁 The Goose Game: A traditional race game with fun illustrated spaces.

  • ♟ Classic 3D Chess: Elegant visuals and fully functional mechanics.

  • 🏒 Air Hockey: Fast-paced, competitive, and physics-based fun.

  • 🎮 Pong Crostle 2: An original game by Crostle’s Studios — a modern twist on the classic Pong with fresh mechanics.

  • 🌈 DoRecolors: An original game where you must follow the color shown on the marker… and only the fastest players survive! Supports up to 8 players — perfect for wild, laughter-filled matches. Features customizable characters, cannons, and countdown timers.

🔑 Key Features:

  • 👥 Online multiplayer with private rooms (optional password).

  • 🖐️ Custom hand cursors: Each player controls their own "hand", complete with emojis and rotation options.

  • 🛋️ Cozy 3D game room with multiple camera angles (frontal, side, etc.) for each chair or couch spot.

  • 💬 Built-in chat system, with player-colored messages based on their seat.

  • 🧭 Free Mode: Walk around the room freely and explore.

  • 🎮 Keyboard shortcuts for passing turns, playing music, or exiting the game.

  • 📋 Player list, room name, FPS, and ping displayed in real time.

  • 🎵 Sound effects for dice rolls, chess pieces, Air Hockey, and Pong Crostle 2.

  • 💤 AFK system that kicks inactive players to keep the experience smooth for everyone.

Perfect for having fun with friends or family in a shared virtual room full of classic games and cozy vibes!
